title: Reorder checkpoint/restore code for CRI-O
body:
This tries to move checkpoint/restore code to a location where it can be easily used by CRI-O.

My plan is to use the result of this PR in https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/4199

This also vendors in checkpointctl which includes code which can be used from Podman, CRI-O and Kubernetes to deal with checkpoint/restore related functionality.

comments.body: Lint is complaining. Overall changes LGTM.

> Lint is complaining. Overall changes LGTM.

I saw it already when working on the commits and thought I need to fix it before submitting. But I forgot. Thanks to CI for reminding me. Will fix it.
Added `[NO TESTS NEEDED]` as this PR is only moving code around.
@adrianreber I think you will need to repush to make this pass tests.
Seems I actually broke something in the checkpoint/restore functionality while moving code around and CI found it, nice. Looking into it.
Needs a rebase (looks like a small conflict)
